meta.title: Run Llama 2 on your Laptop with Jupyter
meta.description:
Install, run and chat with Llama 2 on your Mac or Windows laptop, using llama.cpp and Jupyter Lab.

*Update*
- Running on a Mac M1 (or M2) works quite well. Token generation is fast.
- Video for Windows and Mac with an Intel chip is here: https://youtu.be/mxzxIa5yuXc

*DIY Approach*
- Installing Jupyter Lab: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/install-guides/blob/main/jupyter-lab-setup.md
- Installing llama.cpp: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/install-guides/blob/main/llama-cpp-setup.md

*Purchase Jupyter Llama for Laptop*
A Chat Assistant built on Llama 2.
- Automated install (for Mac, Windows coming soon)
- Save and re-load chats.
- Upload pdf or text files for analysis.
- Search Bing (beta).
- Add custom functions (beta).
- Get access for €9.99 ($10.99): https://buy.stripe.com/dR65l6f4p95V7AI6oA.

Find Trelis at https://huggingface.co/Trelis

00:00 Introduction
00:27 Installing JupyterLab
01:22 Creating a Virtual Environment
02:18 Activating the Environment, Installing ipykernel
02:57 Starting JupyterLab
03:56 Running All Cells
05:49 Downloading the Language Model
07:30 Speed or Long Context Length
08:05 Chatting with Jupyter Llama
